creator: remko@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Hello, first of all thank you for trying to make FreeBSD better! This is 
actually not a problem record, but a question from your side which is 
can I upgrade from FreeBSD 6.3 to FreeBSD-9 by using the sources? I 
believe this is not possible and not supported. You can do intermediate 
steps from 6.3 -> 7 -> 8 -> 9. That is a longer proces, but you have to 
understand that version 6.x and 9.x have a long period of development 
time in between and a lot changed wrt the kernel structure , binaries, 
etc. I'd suggest you contact the FreeBSD Questions mailing list 
(questions@freebsd.org) and ask for detailed advice or assistance 
there.. Goodluck!
